title: Syntel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Syntel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
